items.name_en: 💰Medium-Small Simply FENDI Handbag, debuted at the 2024-25 Fall/Winter Fashion Show, inspired by a vintage style from the early 1990s, named for its elegant basic design. Beige low-gloss calfskin. Adorned with signature FF decoration in matching patent leather. Features a knotted long calfskin pull tab, with an internal lined compartment featuring a zip pocket, and silver hardware. Equipped with an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody carrying.

items.name_cn:
Premium Reproduction Fendi
💗FEND1 iconic Peekaboo ISeeU handbag, petite and cute. White with layered Nappa soft leather, accented with classic turn-lock on both sides. Lined interior with two compartments separated by hard partitions, featuring a pocket and gold hardware. Includes handle and adjustable detachable shoulder strap, for hand or crossbody carry. Made in Italy.
Dimensions 11-20-15
Style 8336

A stunning handmade bag series. Italian original grain Togo calf leather, paired with fully imported custom wax thread and pure hand-stitched outer seams, classic Selleria stitching, top-tier French original water-based oil edges, perfectly combined by hand. Can be carried or slung. A super heavy-craftsmanship classic piece!
